description: Behold. Two card-endpoints at within-set adjacency (135 and 136), depicting the same Johto two-stage Normal-type line at successive life stages. Body-plan progression (round-upright sentinel to long-sinuous burrow-builder) reads cleanly across the matched portrait + action compositions. Completes the line at full canonical 2-of-2 coverage in corpus. Caller called this the cleanest single-edge story in the candidate set — confirmed. Worth the work.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Sentret (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 161, evolves to Furret at level 15]
[Bulbapedia: Furret (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 162, evolved Normal-type]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-136 flavor_text — nest impossible for other Pokemon to enter]
other_candidates_considered: Klang + Meltan industrial-cluster hub-population — rejected for this pass; two cards is the minimum threshold (cards/_hubs/labor.md would benefit from anchor membership but the cluster of just two is thin without a third industrial-Pokemon corpus card to triangulate the hub-attachment thesis). Surface in janitor_triage as a future-edge candidate; if a third industrial Pokemon (e.g. Klink/Klinklang lineage prior stage, Magearna, Genesect, Magnemite line) lands, the hub-anchor case strengthens.

Pupitar 1:1 with Larvitar (BUS) cross-set evolution mirror — rejected for THIS pass; Pupitar would extend the line at 2/3 but is not in the wave 23 enrichment scope and Sentret-Furret is the stronger same-set within-adjacency case. Worth Pupitar attention in a future Edgelord pass when Pupitar's enrichment lands.
Pansage/Pansear cross-print double-edge — rejected; elemental-monkey-trio node already does this work at the cohort layer.
